tasks.title: Analyze extension settings loading and saving in apps/extension/src/background/settingsStorage.ts
tasks.description: Review the extension's settings loading and saving logic in apps/extension/src/background/settingsStorage.ts. Identify how settings are loaded from chrome.storage, how defaults are applied, and how settings are saved. Document key functions such as loadSettings, saveSettings, and the schema used.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear understanding of extension settings loading and saving
List of settings keys and their types
Identification of storage keys used

outputPlan.description: Analysis notes on extension settings loading and saving

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundation for syncing extension settings with website

tasks.title: Analyze website settings loading and saving in apps/web/src/services/SettingsStorage.ts
tasks.description: Review the website's settings loading and saving logic in apps/web/src/services/SettingsStorage.ts or equivalent. Identify how website settings are stored, loaded, and what keys and defaults are used. Document key functions and storage mechanisms.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear understanding of website settings loading and saving
List of website settings keys and types
Identification of storage keys used

outputPlan.description: Analysis notes on website settings loading and saving

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundation for syncing website settings with extension

tasks.title: Design synchronization strategy for extension and website settings
tasks.description: Based on the analyses of extension and website settings, design a synchronization strategy to unify settings usage. Decide whether to share storage keys, use a messaging bridge, or unify storage access. Document the approach, including fallback and conflict resolution.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear documented synchronization strategy
Mapping of settings keys between extension and website
Plan for implementation steps

outputPlan.description: Documented synchronization strategy for extension and website settings

metadata.inputContext: Extension and website settings analysis documents
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides implementation blueprint for syncing settings

tasks.title: Implement unified settings loading in extension background script
tasks.description: Modify apps/extension/src/background/settingsStorage.ts to load settings from the unified source as per the synchronization strategy. Adjust loadSettings and saveSettings functions to reflect the shared storage or bridge communication with the website. Ensure defaults and schema validation remain intact.
acceptanceCriteria: Extension loads settings from unified source
Settings schema validation preserved
No regressions in extension settings usage

outputPlan.description: Unified settings loading and saving logic

tasks.title: Implement unified settings loading in website settings service
tasks.description: Modify apps/web/src/services/SettingsStorage.ts to load and save settings from the unified source as per the synchronization strategy. Ensure compatibility with extension settings and maintain existing website functionality.
acceptanceCriteria: Website loads settings from unified source
Settings schema validation preserved
No regressions in website settings usage

outputPlan.description: Unified settings loading and saving logic

tasks.title: Implement communication bridge for settings synchronization between extension and website
tasks.description: If the synchronization strategy requires runtime communication, implement a messaging bridge between the extension content/background scripts and the website scripts to synchronize settings changes. Use window.postMessage or chrome.runtime messaging as appropriate. Ensure bidirectional sync and conflict resolution.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings changes propagate between extension and website
No infinite loops or race conditions
Robust error handling

outputPlan.description: Add messaging listener for settings sync

targetArtifacts: Messaging bridge code for settings sync
evidence: Code changes in messaging bridge and settings service

tasks.title: Add unit tests for extension settings loading and saving with unified source
tasks.description: Add or update unit tests in apps/extension/src/background/__tests__/settingsStorage.test.ts (or equivalent) to cover the new unified settings loading and saving logic. Test default values, loading from storage, saving, and error cases.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover all new or changed code paths
Tests pass without errors

outputPlan.description: Add tests for unified settings loading and saving

tasks.title: Add unit tests for website settings loading and saving with unified source
tasks.description: Add or update unit tests in apps/web/src/services/__tests__/SettingsStorage.test.ts (or equivalent) to cover the new unified settings loading and saving logic. Test default values, loading from storage, saving, and error cases.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover all new or changed code paths
Tests pass without errors

outputPlan.description: Add tests for unified settings loading and saving

tasks.title: Perform manual testing of extension and website settings synchronization
tasks.description: Manually test the extension and website to verify that settings changes in one are reflected in the other. Test themeMode, AI provider, toolbar visibility, and other key settings. Verify persistence across reloads and browser restarts.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings changes in extension reflect in website immediately or on reload
Settings changes in website reflect in extension immediately or on reload
No errors or warnings in console
Settings persist after browser restart

outputPlan.description: Manual testing report for settings synchronization
